headline: GE Vernova target bumped on stronger turbine pricing amid electrification demand
summary: Investing.com -- Morgan Stanley raised its price target on GE Vernova to $960 from $817 citing improving demand for gas turbines, rising pricing and stronger medium-term growth tied to electrification.

headline: GE Vernova Set For Strong 2026 Gas Power Orders: Analyst
summary: Analyst highlights GE Vernova's electrification growth: doubling backlog to $60B by 2028 and leveraging $150B HVDC pipeline and $5B/year synchronous condenser opportunities.

summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Andrew Percoco   maintains GE Vernova (NYSE:GEV) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $817 to $960.

headline: Energy: What to watch at CERAWeek amid Iran war, rising oil prices
summary: World energy leaders and officials will convene at the CERAWeek conference starting March 23, which is annually hosted by S&P Global and has been dubbed the "Davos of energy." Yahoo Finance Breaking News Reporter Jake Conley speaks with Market Catalysts Host Julie Hyman about the topics that will be tackled at CERAWeek — not just the recent rise in oil prices (CL=F, BZ=F) in relation to Iran's closure of the Strait of Hormuz amid escalating conflicts — as well as the top executives they will be interviewing at the event.
